notes.note: A natural language name identifying the implementation guide. This name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation.
A short, descriptive, user-friendly title for the implementation guide.
The name of the organization or individual that published the implementation guide.
The name of an individual to contact.
A representation of the meaning of the code in the system, following the rules of the system.
A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Profil « Bundle » de type « searchset » encapsulant une collection de 0, une ou plusieurs ressources « CareTeam » répondant aux critères de recherche. Les ressources référencées par les ressources CareTeam retournées sont aussi dans le Bundle s’il a été demandé de les inclure dans la requête GET.

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Profil défini dans le volet de Gestion du Cercle de Soins (flux 1c) pour créer un cercle de soins selon l’option Transaction. Il s'agit d'un bundle de type `transaction` permettant d'organiser le contenu du flux de création d'un cercle de soins.

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Profil défini dans le volet de Gestion du Cercle de Soins (flux 1c) pour mettre à jour un cercle de soins selon l’option Transaction. Il s'agit d'un bundle de type "transaction" permettant d'organiser le contenu du flux de création d'un cercle de soins.

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Profil héritant du profil défini dans DCTM et défini pour le volet Gestion du Cercle de Soins. Le concept métier « cercle de soins » correspond à la ressource FHIR « CareTeam ».

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Profil créé pour le volet Gestion du Cercle de Soins afin de décrire les contacts du sujet du cercle de soins (aidant, personne de confiance…).

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Profil organization adapté au cercle de soins. Ce profil peut modéliser une entité juridique (EJ), une entité géographique (EG) ou une organisation interne (OI)

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Recherche sur la date de fin du cercle de soins

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Organisation responsable du Cercle De Soins

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Date de sortie d’un membre du cercle de soins

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Date d’entrée d’un membre du cercle de soins

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Recherche sur la date de création du cercle de soins

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.
A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).
A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).

trans-unit.source: CI-SIS Gestion du Cercle de Soins - Consommateur

notes.note: A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Le rôle de consommateur incarné par un système, peut consulter un cercle de soins. Exemples de consommateur : un dossier patient informatisé, un système de gestion de laboratoire, un système d’information radiologique, un logiciel de gestion de cabinet, un service numérique d’appui à la coordination.

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).

trans-unit.source: CI-SIS Gestion du Cercle de Soins - CreateurRestful

notes.note: A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Le rôle de créateur incarné par un système peut créer ou mettre à jour le cercle de soins d'une personne

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).

trans-unit.source: CI-SIS Gestion du Cercle de Soins - CreateurTransaction

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).

trans-unit.source: CI-SIS Gestion du Cercle de Soins - Gestionnaire

notes.note: A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Le rôle de gestionnaire incarné par un système, gère et stocke le cercle de soins, donne accès aux informations en cas de consultation.

notes.note: A human assigned name for the resource. All resources SHOULD have a name, but the name may be extracted from the resource (e.g. ValueSet.name).

trans-unit.source: Roles des participants dans un cercle de soins

notes.note: A description of the reason that a resource has been included in the implementation guide.

trans-unit.source: Roles des participants dans un cercle de soins.
